title: Shot Them All
description: Sort all color balls in the tubes, How far can you go? Sort it Puzzle is a fun and addictive puzzle game! Try to sort the colored balls in the tubes until all balls with the same color stay in the same tube. A challenging yet refreshing game to exercise your brain!
instructions: FEATURES One finger control NO penalty time limit you can enjoy Ball Sort Puzzle at your own pace NO WIFI No problem You can enjoy the game anytime anywhere
